summary: Iteration 15 testing complete: Jantri Report (Bid History) feature fully verified. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all required elements: जंतरी रिपोर्ट tab, date picker, game dropdown, Submit/Reset buttons, Jodi 00-99 grid (10x10), Andar Haruf 0-9 row, Bahar Haruf 0-9 row, and Summary section with Jantri(Jodi), Andar Haruf, Bahar Haruf, Loss, Profit, Total.

issues: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - minor React state update warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report requires admin auth (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns 200 with admin auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns all 100 jodi numbers (00-99)
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns andar haruf (0-9)
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns bahar haruf (0-9)
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns summary with jodi_total, andar_total, bahar_total, total, max_loss, profit
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report accepts game_id parameter
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report accepts date parameter
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns crossing field
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report returns worst_jodi in summary
Backend: GET /api/admin/jantri-report works with both game_id and date params
Frontend: Admin panel has 'जंतरी रिपोर्ट' tab
Frontend: Jantri Report has date picker (data-testid='jantri-date-input')
Frontend: Jantri Report has game dropdown (data-testid='jantri-game-select')
Frontend: Jantri Report has Submit button (data-testid='jantri-submit-btn')
Frontend: Jantri Report has Reset button (data-testid='jantri-reset-btn')
Frontend: Jantri Report shows Jodi (00-99) grid with 100 cells
Frontend: Jantri Report shows Andar Haruf (0-9) row with 10 cells
Frontend: Jantri Report shows Bahar Haruf (0-9) row with 10 cells
Frontend: Jantri Report shows summary section with Jantri(Jodi), Andar Haruf, Bahar Haruf, Loss, Profit, Total
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint /api/admin/jantri-report correctly implemented in admin_routes.py with proper auth check
API returns all 100 jodi numbers (00-99) initialized to 0 when no bets exist
API returns andar and bahar haruf (0-9) with amounts
Summary calculation includes jodi_total, andar_total, bahar_total, crossing_total, total, max_loss, worst_jodi, profit
Frontend AdminJantriTab.js correctly renders 10x10 jodi grid, andar/bahar rows, and summary section
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - all amounts show 0 as no active bets exist
